constraints: Encrypted JSONL plus JSON index remains the current safe default
The account-memory backend may move away from JSON/JSONL when measurements show a meaningful performance gain and at-rest privacy remains at least as strong
Indexes and semantic cache must be rebuildable from the chosen encrypted source of truth
No default hard cap on account memory entries
Runtime retrieval must remain feasible on a modern notebook CPU
Clinical and psychoanalytic entries are signals or hypotheses, not diagnoses
objective: Expand Account Memory Schema V2 with many more clinically useful memory types, informed by psychiatric and psychotherapy documentation patterns.

sources.name: NCBI StatPearls Mental Status Examination
takeaways: MSE is a structured psychiatric examination; useful domains include appearance, behavior, speech, mood, thought, perception, cognition, insight, judgment.

sources.name: ICANotes psychiatric SOAP guide
takeaways: Psychiatric progress notes commonly use SOAP, DAP, BIRP; memory types should support subjective/objective/assessment/plan and intervention/response separation.

sources.name: Mentalyc biopsychosocial assessment guide
takeaways: BPS assessments gather biological, psychological, and social domains; 5P/4P formulation suggests presenting, predisposing, precipitating, perpetuating, protective factors.

sources.name: Supanote documentation cheat sheet
takeaways: Risk documentation should include ideation, protective factors, and action taken; psychotherapy process notes are separate from progress notes.

sources.name: Heidi mental health assessment template
takeaways: Assessments commonly include reason for visit, presenting issue, psychiatric history, medication, MSE, diagnosis, treatment plan, safety assessment, and next steps.

architecture_comparison.generative_agents: TeeBotus now mirrors the practical subset: full JSONL memory stream, retrieval over relevance/recency/importance, access-recency metadata, and reflection/summary entries created by maintenance jobs. It is not a full autonomous simulation/planning agent.
architecture_comparison.memgpt_letta: TeeBotus keeps fast prompt context plus slower encrypted JSONL archival memory. It now lets the model request one bounded active local memory page per turn through a strict protocol; a native tool-call wrapper can later use the same store path.
architecture_comparison.langgraph_langchain: TeeBotus now separates episodic, semantic, and procedural memory through memory_type and type indexes; account memory is long-term account-scoped, while WorkingMemory remains instance-scoped short-term/operator memory.
architecture_comparison.mem0: TeeBotus adds local consolidation from repeated episodes into semantic summaries with provenance. It is deterministic and notebook-friendly, not a learned extraction pipeline.
architecture_comparison.zep_graphiti: TeeBotus adds typed temporal relation edges with valid_from, valid_to, provenance, supports, contradicts, supersedes, and derived_from. It is a small local graph, not a separate graph database.
architecture_comparison.storage_backend: TeeBotus is not locked to JSON. SQLite with row-level AES-GCM encrypted payloads is the preferred next backend candidate when benchmarks show JSONL full-file rewrites becoming a latency problem.

notes: SOAP/DAP/BIRP/PIRP/GIRP separate data, assessment, behavior/problem/goal, intervention, response, and plan.
MSE domains and BPS/5P formulation should become memory kinds or facets.
Risk/safety and psychotherapy process notes need explicit sensitivity/provenance handling.

Added broad families for progress-note sections, intake/history, functioning, BPS/5P formulation, MSE, symptoms/body state, risk/safety, diagnostic hypotheses, therapy process, medication, and care operations.
Kept clinical/psychoanalytic values as typed observations, signals, or hypotheses with source provenance, not diagnosis facts.
Extended ACCOUNT_MEMORY_KINDS.
Risk/safety and medication/care/treatment values retain by default.
MSE and progress-note observations compact by default.
Risk/safety and diagnostic/formulation signals get salience boosts.
Docs now list the researched type families.
Representative clinical note kinds are covered for kind normalization, decay policy, index metadata, and salience.
Compared TeeBotus V2 with Generative Agents, MemGPT/Letta, LangGraph/LangChain Memory, Mem0, and Zep/Graphiti.

Implement notebook-friendly subset: local semantic hash-embeddings, last_accessed_at/access_count, memory_type episodic/semantic/procedural, temporal typed relations with provenance, and deterministic background consolidation.
Keep JSONL as source of truth and make all indexes/caches rebuildable.
Added bounded active paging: the model can request one extra local account-memory page with a strict TEE_MEMORY_PAGE protocol.
Added exclude_ids support so active pages do not repeat already loaded memory IDs.
Kept graphserver as optional future projection; JSONL remains the encrypted source of truth and index.graph remains rebuildable.
Stopped treating JSON/JSONL as a permanent architecture constraint.
Documented SQLite with row-level AES-GCM encrypted payloads as the next likely backend candidate.
Added a local benchmark script so backend migration can be decided from append/select/rebuild timings on the target notebook CPU.
